summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 4 new UGG platform features: WebSocket real-time events, Recharts dashboard visualizations, drag-and-drop field mapping, and canary deployment workflow. All backend APIs working (100% success rate). Frontend features functional with live WebSocket events, charts, and full deployment workflow.

design_issues.issue: React key warning for duplicate event IDs in console

passed_tests: Backend: All 41 API endpoints (100% success rate)
Dashboard: Live WebSocket indicator showing real-time events
Dashboard: Event Volume area chart with Recharts
Dashboard: Protocol Mix pie chart with real data
Dashboard: Event Severity and Device Status bar charts
Live Event Feed: Receiving new events via WebSocket (5 new events in 10s)
Connector Builder: Field Mapping and Deployments tabs
Connector Builder: Drag-and-drop interface (12 source, 13 canonical fields)
Connector Builder: Save Mappings button functional
Deployments: Create deployment with Canary strategy (4 phases)
Deployments: Start deployment with health checks
Deployments: Promote deployment to next phase
All deployment APIs: POST /api/connectors/{id}/deploy, approve, start, promote, rollback
